body_excerpt: In i915_gem_execbuffer2_ioctl of i915_gem_execbuffer.c, there is a possible arbitrary kernel memory write due to a missing validation of a userspace pointer. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
